records.rationale: Two adversarial plan-review tracks produced release-critical changes for canonical plan registration, public claim audit, research compliance, shared registry publication, saved-everything release coverage, freshness evidence, and AI SDK boundary auditing.

findings.finding: The plan needed a canonical release registry and release doctor enforcement so stale or duplicate backlog items could not be mistaken for the release path.
findings.rationale: Accepted and implemented through canonical release plan, shared registry, freshness, and saved-everything gates.

findings.finding: The plan needed public claim, research compliance, provider-boundary, and release evidence gates before OSS/BYOK claims could be promoted.
findings.rationale: Accepted and implemented through public claims, research legal/privacy, AI SDK provider-boundary, and release-evidence freshness gates.

capacityFailure.reason: archived reviewers produced useful objections, but both used the same local Codex provider and execution root so they cannot satisfy independent plan-review quorum

reviewerDeficit.reason: archived reviewers produced useful objections, but both used the same local Codex provider and execution root so they cannot satisfy independent plan-review quorum

riskAcceptance.rollbackPlan: Revert or supersede material plan mutation 2026-05-25-two-adversarial-reviewers, remove the affected changedTaskIds from release readiness, and rerun release doctor before any public release if independent adversarial quorum cannot be obtained before expiry.

records.rationale: A repeat request to spawn adversarial subagents hit the platform thread limit; the capacity failure was recorded and converted into a backlog entropy audit task rather than silently treating missing reviewers as approval.

capacityFailure.reason: multi_agent spawn failed with thread-limit reached

reviewerDeficit.reason: multi_agent spawn failed with thread-limit reached

riskAcceptance.rollbackPlan: Revert or supersede material plan mutation 2026-05-26-thread-limit-capacity-failure, remove the affected changedTaskIds from release readiness, and rerun release doctor before any public release if independent adversarial quorum cannot be obtained before expiry.

records.rationale: The user requested two adversarial subagents to improve the Matematica CLI plan; their objections were persisted and converted into release-plan hardening work while recording that same local Codex lineage cannot count as independent quorum.

findings.finding: Plan-review independence must reject same provider, upstream, model family, prompt lineage, or execution root even when reviewer labels differ.
findings.rationale: Accepted by hardening the plan-change review validator and adding same-provider regression coverage.

findings.finding: Material plan changes need replayable hashes and stricter evidence binding rather than bare task and artifact ids.
findings.rationale: Accepted by adding review hash validation and backlog tasks for before/after plan hashes, task snapshots, and artifact hash binding.

findings.finding: The CLI needs explicit goal contracts, append-only ledger completeness, budget caps, provider mocks, resume, export, and OSS free-mode release gates.
findings.rationale: Accepted as concrete implementation tasks and release-gate requirements for the Bun TypeScript CLI plan.

findings.finding: Public copy and CLI UX must avoid unsupported math-success claims and expose budget state, phase state, agent count, cost, ledger path, resume command, and failure reason.
findings.rationale: Accepted as no-unsafe-claims, lifecycle command, and operator-status requirements.

capacityFailure.reason: two spawned reviewers returned objections, but both share local Codex provider, upstream, model family, and execution root; independent reviewer capacity was unavailable in this environment

reviewerDeficit.reason: two spawned reviewers returned objections, but both share local Codex provider, upstream, model family, and execution root; independent reviewer capacity was unavailable in this environment

riskAcceptance.rollbackPlan: Revert or supersede material plan mutation 2026-05-26-peirce-carson-adversarial-review, remove the affected changedTaskIds from release readiness, and rerun release doctor before any public release if independent adversarial quorum cannot be obtained before expiry.
